You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 25.01 (commit: a24e5d1d).

## Issue to Resolve

[Reader IA] Show lists directly on dropdown menu if there are 2 or fewer
We are currently grouping the Lists in a "Lists" submenu independent of the number of lists the user has, but we should only show that submenu when the user has over 2 lists.

So if the user has 2 or fewer, they should be displayed directly in the menu root.

![image](https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/assets/5091503/57e663d9-218f-4a58-a447-05a86406ea86)

Internal ref: pcdRpT-4tr-p2#comment-7237

- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/utils/ReaderTopBarMenuHelper.kt`

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils
  2→
  3→import androidx.collection.SparseArrayCompat
  4→import androidx.collection.forEach
  5→import androidx.collection.isNotEmpty
  6→import androidx.collection.set
  7→import org.wordpress.android.R
  8→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  9→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagList
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown.MenuElementData
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 13→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 14→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.indexOrNull
 15→import javax.inject.Inject
 16→
 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor(
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 19→) {
 20→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 21→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 23→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 26→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 29→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 32→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 35→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { followedP2sIndex ->
 38→                add(createFollowedP2sItem(
 39→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followedP2sIndex),
 40→                    text = readerTagsList[followedP2sIndex].tagTitle,
 41→                ))
 42→            }
 43→            if (readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 44→                readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isTags }?.let { tagsIndex ->
 45→                    add(createTagsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(tagsIndex)))
 46→                }
 47→            }
 48→            readerTagsList
 49→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 50→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 51→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 52→                    }
 53→                    sparseArray
 54→                }
 55→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 56→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 57→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 58→                    add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 59→                }
 60→        }
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 64→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 65→            id = id,
 66→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 67→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 68→        )
 69→    }
 70→
 71→    private fun createSubscriptionsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 72→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 73→            id = id,
 74→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions),
 75→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 76→        )
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    private fun createSavedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 80→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 81→            id = id,
 82→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved),
 83→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_saved_24dp,
 84→        )
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun createLikedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 88→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 89→            id = id,
 90→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked),
 91→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
 92→        )
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    private fun createAutomatticItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 96→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 97→            id = id,
 98→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
 99→        )
100→    }
101→
102→    private fun createFollowedP2sItem(id: String, text: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
103→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
104→            id = id,
105→            text = UiString.UiStringText(text),
106→        )
107→    }
108→
109→    private fun createTagsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
110→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
111→            id = id,
112→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_tags),
113→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_tags_24dp,
114→        )
115→    }
116→
117→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
118→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
119→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
120→            customListsMenuItems.add(
121→                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
122→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
123→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
124→                )
125→            )
126→        }
127→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
128→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
129→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
130→            id = "custom-lists",
131→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
132→            children = customListsMenuItems,
133→        )
134→    }
135→
136→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
137→
138→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
139→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils
  2→
  3→import org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat
  4→import org.junit.Test
  5→import org.mockito.kotlin.doReturn
  6→import org.mockito.kotlin.mock
  7→import org.mockito.kotlin.whenever
  8→import org.wordpress.android.R
  9→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagList
 11→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown.MenuElementData
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringText
 15→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 16→
 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelperReproductionTest {
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig = mock()
 19→    val helper = ReaderTopBarMenuHelper(
 20→        readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig = readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 21→    )
 22→
 23→    @Test
 24→    fun `GIVEN 2 custom lists WHEN createMenu THEN lists displayed directly in root`() {
 25→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(false)
 26→
 27→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 28→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 0
 29→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-2")) // item 1
 30→        }
 31→
 32→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
 33→
 34→        // Verify Divider is added
 35→        assertThat(menu).contains(MenuElementData.Divider)
 36→
 37→        // Verify items are directly in the menu, NOT in a submenu
 38→        val customList1Item = menu.findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringText("custom-list-1") }
 39→        assertThat(customList1Item).isNotNull()
 40→        assertThat(customList1Item?.id).isEqualTo("0")
 41→
 42→        val customList2Item = menu.findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringText("custom-list-2") }
 43→        assertThat(customList2Item).isNotNull()
 44→        assertThat(customList2Item?.id).isEqualTo("1")
 45→
 46→        // Verify SubMenu does not exist
 47→        val subMenu = menu.findSubMenu()
 48→        assertThat(subMenu).isNull()
 49→    }
 50→
 51→    @Test
 52→    fun `GIVEN 3 custom lists WHEN createMenu THEN lists displayed in submenu`() {
 53→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(false)
 54→
 55→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 56→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 0
 57→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-2")) // item 1
 58→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-3")) // item 2
 59→        }
 60→
 61→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
 62→
 63→        // Verify Divider is added
 64→        assertThat(menu).contains(MenuElementData.Divider)
 65→
 66→        // Verify items are NOT directly in the menu
 67→        val customList1Item = menu.findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringText("custom-list-1") }
 68→        assertThat(customList1Item).isNull()
 69→
 70→        // Verify SubMenu exists
 71→        val subMenu = menu.findSubMenu()
 72→        assertThat(subMenu).isNotNull()
 73→        assertThat(subMenu?.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists))
 74→        assertThat(subMenu?.children).hasSize(3)
 75→    }
 76→
 77→    @Test
 78→    fun `GIVEN 1 custom list WHEN createMenu THEN list displayed directly in root`() {
 79→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(false)
 80→
 81→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 82→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 0
 83→        }
 84→
 85→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
 86→
 87→        // Verify Divider is added
 88→        assertThat(menu).contains(MenuElementData.Divider)
 89→
 90→        // Verify item is directly in the menu, NOT in a submenu
 91→        val customList1Item = menu.findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringText("custom-list-1") }
 92→        assertThat(customList1Item).isNotNull()
 93→        assertThat(customList1Item?.id).isEqualTo("0")
 94→
 95→        // Verify SubMenu does not exist
 96→        val subMenu = menu.findSubMenu()
 97→        assertThat(subMenu).isNull()
 98→    }
 99→
100→
101→    private fun List<MenuElementData>.findSingleItem(
102→        predicate: (MenuElementData.Item.Single) -> Boolean
103→    ): MenuElementData.Item.Single? {
104→        return find { it is MenuElementData.Item.Single && predicate(it) } as? MenuElementData.Item.Single
105→    }
106→
107→    private fun List<MenuElementData>.findSubMenu(): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu? {
108→        return find { it is MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu } as? MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu
109→    }
110→
111→    private fun createCustomListTag(title: String): ReaderTag {
112→        return ReaderTag(
113→            title,
114→            title,
115→            title,
116→            "http://endpoint.com",
117→            ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST
118→        )
119→    }
120→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils
  2→
  3→import androidx.collection.SparseArrayCompat
  4→import androidx.collection.forEach
  5→import androidx.collection.isNotEmpty
  6→import androidx.collection.set
  7→import org.wordpress.android.R
  8→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  9→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagList
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown.MenuElementData
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 13→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 14→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.indexOrNull
 15→import javax.inject.Inject
 16→
 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor(
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 19→) {
 20→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 21→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 23→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 26→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 29→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 32→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 35→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { followedP2sIndex ->
 38→                add(createFollowedP2sItem(
 39→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followedP2sIndex),
 40→                    text = readerTagsList[followedP2sIndex].tagTitle,
 41→                ))
 42→            }
 43→            if (readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 44→                readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isTags }?.let { tagsIndex ->
 45→                    add(createTagsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(tagsIndex)))
 46→                }
 47→            }
 48→            readerTagsList
 49→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 50→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 51→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 52→                    }
 53→                    sparseArray
 54→                }
 55→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 56→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 57→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 58→                    add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))

content.text:
The issue was that custom lists were always grouped in a "Lists" submenu, regardless of how many there were. The requirement was to show them directly in the root menu if there are 2 or fewer, and only group them in a submenu if there are more than 2.

I modified `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/utils/ReaderTopBarMenuHelper.kt`.

1.  Refactored `createCustomListsItem` to `createCustomListsSubMenu` and extracted the single item creation logic into `createCustomListSingleItem` to allow code reuse.
2.  Updated `createMenu` to check the size of `customListsArray`.
    *   If `size() <= 2`, it iterates through the lists and adds them as single items directly to the menu using `createCustomListSingleItem`.
    *   If `size() > 2`, it uses `createCustomListsSubMenu` to add them as a submenu (preserving the existing behavior for > 2 lists).

The logic ensures that:
*   Users with 1 or 2 lists see them immediately in the dropdown.
*   Users with 3+ lists see them grouped, keeping the menu clean.
*   The divider is still added before the custom lists section in both cases.

I attempted to write a reproduction test, but the test environment had issues running the tests (hanging during Mockito initialization). However, the code changes are minimal and purely logical, directly addressing the requirement. I deleted the failing test file to keep the codebase clean.

Relevant code changes in `ReaderTopBarMenuHelper.kt`:

```kotlin
                .let { customListsArray ->
                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
                    if (customListsArray.size() <= 2) {
                        customListsArray.forEach { index, readerTag ->
                            add(createCustomListSingleItem(index, readerTag))
                        }
                    } else {
                        add(createCustomListsSubMenu(customListsArray))
                    }
                }
```

120→            customListsMenuItems.add(

123→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),

129→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.

132→            children = customListsMenuItems,

 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelperReproductionTest {
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig = mock()
 19→    val helper = ReaderTopBarMenuHelper(
 20→        readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig = readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 21→    )
 22→
 23→    @Test
 24→    fun `GIVEN 2 custom lists WHEN createMenu THEN lists displayed directly in root`() {
 25→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(false)
 26→
 27→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 28→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 0
 29→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-2")) // item 1
 30→        }
 31→
 32→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
 33→
 34→        // Verify Divider is added
 35→        assertThat(menu).contains(MenuElementData.Divider)
 36→
 37→        // Verify items are directly in the menu, NOT in a submenu
 38→        val customList1Item = menu.findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringText("custom-list-1") }
 39→        assertThat(customList1Item).isNotNull()
 40→        assertThat(customList1Item?.id).isEqualTo("0")
 41→
 42→        val customList2Item = menu.findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringText("custom-list-2") }
 43→        assertThat(customList2Item).isNotNull()
 44→        assertThat(customList2Item?.id).isEqualTo("1")
 45→
 46→        // Verify SubMenu does not exist
 47→        val subMenu = menu.findSubMenu()
 48→        assertThat(subMenu).isNull()
 49→    }
 50→
 51→    @Test
 52→    fun `GIVEN 3 custom lists WHEN createMenu THEN lists displayed in submenu`() {
 53→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(false)
 54→
 55→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 56→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 0
 57→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-2")) // item 1
 58→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-3")) // item 2
 59→        }
 60→
 61→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
 62→
 63→        // Verify Divider is added
 64→        assertThat(menu).contains(MenuElementData.Divider)
 65→
 66→        // Verify items are NOT directly in the menu
 67→        val customList1Item = menu.findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringText("custom-list-1") }
 68→        assertThat(customList1Item).isNull()
 69→
 70→        // Verify SubMenu exists
 71→        val subMenu = menu.findSubMenu()
 72→        assertThat(subMenu).isNotNull()
 73→        assertThat(subMenu?.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists))
 74→        assertThat(subMenu?.children).hasSize(3)
 75→    }
 76→
 77→    @Test
 78→    fun `GIVEN 1 custom list WHEN createMenu THEN list displayed directly in root`() {
 79→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(false)
 80→
 81→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 82→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 0
 83→        }
 84→
 85→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
 86→
 87→        // Verify Divider is added
 88→        assertThat(menu).contains(MenuElementData.Divider)
 89→
 90→        // Verify item is directly in the menu, NOT in a submenu
 91→        val customList1Item = menu.findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringText("custom-list-1") }
 92→        assertThat(customList1Item).isNotNull()
 93→        assertThat(customList1Item?.id).isEqualTo("0")
 94→
 95→        // Verify SubMenu does not exist
 96→        val subMenu = menu.findSubMenu()
 97→        assertThat(subMenu).isNull()
 98→    }

102→        predicate: (MenuElementData.Item.Single) -> Boolean
103→    ): MenuElementData.Item.Single? {

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils
  2→
  3→import androidx.collection.SparseArrayCompat
  4→import androidx.collection.forEach
  5→import androidx.collection.isNotEmpty
  6→import androidx.collection.set
  7→import org.wordpress.android.R
  8→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  9→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagList
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown.MenuElementData
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 13→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 14→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.indexOrNull
 15→import javax.inject.Inject
 16→
 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor(
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 19→) {
 20→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 21→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 23→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 26→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 29→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 32→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 35→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { followedP2sIndex ->
 38→                add(createFollowedP2sItem(
 39→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followedP2sIndex),
 40→                    text = readerTagsList[followedP2sIndex].tagTitle,
 41→                ))
 42→            }
 43→            if (readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 44→                readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isTags }?.let { tagsIndex ->
 45→                    add(createTagsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(tagsIndex)))
 46→                }
 47→            }
 48→            readerTagsList
 49→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 50→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 51→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 52→                    }
 53→                    sparseArray
 54→                }
 55→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 56→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 57→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 58→                    add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 59→                }
 60→        }
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 64→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 65→            id = id,
 66→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 67→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 68→        )
 69→    }
 70→
 71→    private fun createSubscriptionsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 72→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 73→            id = id,
 74→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions),
 75→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 76→        )
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    private fun createSavedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 80→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 81→            id = id,
 82→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved),
 83→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_saved_24dp,
 84→        )
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun createLikedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 88→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 89→            id = id,
 90→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked),
 91→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
 92→        )
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    private fun createAutomatticItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 96→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 97→            id = id,
 98→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
 99→        )
100→    }
101→
102→    private fun createFollowedP2sItem(id: String, text: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
103→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
104→            id = id,
105→            text = UiString.UiStringText(text),
106→        )
107→    }
108→
109→    private fun createTagsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
110→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
111→            id = id,
112→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_tags),
113→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_tags_24dp,
114→        )
115→    }
116→
117→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
118→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
119→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
120→            customListsMenuItems.add(
121→                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
122→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
123→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
124→                )
125→            )
126→        }
127→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
128→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
129→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
130→            id = "custom-lists",
131→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
132→            children = customListsMenuItems,
133→        )
134→    }
135→
136→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
137→
138→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
139→}

 21→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 23→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 26→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 29→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 30→            }

 32→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 35→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { followedP2sIndex ->
 38→                add(createFollowedP2sItem(
 39→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followedP2sIndex),
 40→                    text = readerTagsList[followedP2sIndex].tagTitle,
 41→                ))
 42→            }
 43→            if (readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 44→                readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isTags }?.let { tagsIndex ->
 45→                    add(createTagsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(tagsIndex)))
 46→                }
 47→            }
 48→            readerTagsList
 49→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 50→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 51→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag

 56→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 57→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)

 62→                    } else {
 63→                        add(createCustomListsSubMenu(customListsArray))
 64→                    }
 65→                }
 66→        }
 67→    }
